articles.headline: Creating near-term lunar settlements: lessons from space history

articles.takeaway: Historical milestones show that major spaceflight achievements required 40+ years from foundational research to operational capability, suggesting realistic lunar settlement timelines may extend beyond current industry projections.

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational optimization across the full aviation system—not just individual aircraft—is critical to meeting capacity growth while reducing environmental impact.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
